pr.title: Record: 11L Sidecar48 + Enhanced Attention + Async Data Pipeline + AdamW TTT (20 epochs, cosine LR, 3-seed mean val_bpb=1.0573)

output.summary: 11L transformer augments attention with learned shift/gain mixes and local residuals while using async mmap coprime-shard sampling plus denser stride-32 eval for TTT.
techniques: Learned k/v shift mix, per-head k_gain, and local value residuals
Async mmap data pipeline with coprime-stride shard mixing
